美股與國際市場 ·

日圓救市紅利多消退？進口商美元承接把155打成攻防線Japan’s yen-defense bump fades as corporate dollar bids pin price near 155

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6461010

  • 日本官民救市後美元兌日圓跌勢回血甚快，短時間內又逼近約158的前期弱勢區。
  • 進口企業避險與結匯的美元實需買盤強勁，被視為難以有效跌破155的厚牆。
  • 中東情勢推升油價與美元需求，且投機性日元空單不如2024年集中，干預帶動的升值動能受限。
  • 選擇權風險逆轉顯示市場對日圓暴漲仍相對冷靜，警戒度未回到年初美方關切匯價時的水準。
  • 分析師示警若匯價上破155，美元承接可能更積極；市場留意再干預但對持久效果多存疑。

日圓短暫受救市支撐後升幅快速回吐，匯率回到約158；進口商美元預約買單暴增被視為主因，155成攻守焦點。油價與地緣推升美元，空頭未如去年集中使逼空力道不足，選擇權也顯示市場對暴漲態度偏淡定。

  • After official yen support, USD/JPY quickly retraced its drop and again approached the high-158 area.
  • Strong corporate USD hedging and settlement flows are seen blocking a decisive break beneath the 155 handle.
  • Mideast turmoil lifted oil and dollar demand while smaller speculative yen shorts than in 2024 limited squeeze rallies.
  • Options risk reversal suggests muted fear of a violent yen spike versus caution seen earlier under U.S. FX scrutiny.
  • Strategists warn a move above 155 USD/JPY may draw heavier importer bids; traders eye fresh intervention odds but doubt lasting impact.

Post-intervention yen strength faded quickly; USD/JPY neared ~158 as importers chased dollars and 155 stayed pivotal. Higher oil amid Mideast risk bo…
